message:
chore: broaden .claude/ gitignore from single file to entire directory

Replace the narrow .claude/settings.local.json entry with .claude/ so
the full Claude Code workspace directory (settings, session state,
project context) is ignored. The previous entry only caught one file,
leaving the rest of the directory untracked but visible in git status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -107,7 +107,7 @@ storage.sqlite3.corrupt-*
 storage.sqlite3-shm.corrupt-*
 storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 .env
-.claude/settings.local.json
+.claude/
 .gomodcache/
 
 # Go build cache (NEVER commit this — an agent did once, 3500+ files, 100+ MB)
